title: marrubium astracanicum subsp. macrodon
intro: Marrubium astracanicum subsp. macrodon, also known as Horehound, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Marrubium astracanicum subsp. macrodon include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in digestion. The herb can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
